description: Defines DTO responsibilities, boundaries, naming, and usage rules across routes, services, repositories, and API contracts.

rules.name: Routes must use DTOs
rules.description: Route handlers must map request payloads and path parameters into typed request DTOs before calling services.

rules.name: Services must receive DTOs
rules.description: Service methods must receive typed DTO/request objects instead of primitive parameter lists or raw request dictionaries.

rules.name: Repositories must receive DTOs or domain objects
rules.description: Repositories must receive typed request DTOs or domain objects instead of raw transport payload dictionaries.

rules.name: DTOs use snake_case internally
rules.description: DTO properties must use snake_case internally in Python/backend code.

rules.name: DTO mapping belongs to mapper layer
rules.description: Conversion between API payloads, DTOs, domain objects, and response dictionaries must be centralized in mapper classes/functions.

rules.name: DTOs must be responsibility-specific
rules.description: DTOs should represent a specific use case or operation and should avoid becoming large generic transport objects reused across unrelated operations.
